name: tri-state-relay-service
description: Local macOS agent relay queue with serialized speech playback.

scripts.build:native:cli: mkdir -p dist/native && perry compile src/cli.ts -o dist/native/relay
scripts.build:native: npm run build:native:cli && perry compile src/processor.ts -o dist/native/relay-processor
scripts.build:macos:direct: npm run build:native:cli && rm -rf dist/macos/Tri-State\ Relay\ Service.app && mkdir -p dist/macos/Tri-State\ Relay\ Service.app/Contents/MacOS && cp src/macos/Info.plist dist/macos/Tri-State\ Relay\ Service.app/Contents/Info.plist && swiftc -parse-as-library src/macos/TriStateRelayService.swift -o dist/macos/Tri-State\ Relay\ Service.app/Contents/MacOS/Tri-State\ Relay\ Service && cp dist/native/relay dist/macos/Tri-State\ Relay\ Service.app/Contents/MacOS/
scripts.build:macos:app-store: npm run build:native:cli && rm -rf dist/macos-app-store/Tri-State\ Relay\ Service.app && mkdir -p dist/macos-app-store/Tri-State\ Relay\ Service.app/Contents/MacOS && cp src/macos/Info.plist dist/macos-app-store/Tri-State\ Relay\ Service.app/Contents/Info.plist && swiftc -parse-as-library -D APP_STORE src/macos/TriStateRelayService.swift -o dist/macos-app-store/Tri-State\ Relay\ Service.app/Contents/MacOS/Tri-State\ Relay\ Service && cp dist/native/relay dist/macos-app-store/Tri-State\ Relay\ Service.app/Contents/MacOS/
scripts.validate: npm test && npm run typecheck && npm run perry:check && npm run build
